title: Missouri AG sues crypto ATM operator CoinFlip ‘for enabling scams’
summary: The lawsuit followed the launch of a December 2025 investigation by Missouri authorities into several crypto ATM companies, citing “deceptive fee structures” and scams.

title: Coinbase expands branded stablecoin infrastructure business with Flipcash USDF launch
summary: The launch marks Coinbase’s latest push into white-label stablecoin infrastructure for businesses building branded digital payment and settlement systems.

title: Musk Ally Gracias Stands to Make Billions Off SpaceX IPO
summary: Antonio Gracias, the founder of Valor Equity Partners and a longtime Elon Musk ally, controls a 7.3% stake in SpaceX, making him the second-largest holder after Musk himself that will earn the investor a giant windfall.

title: AvalonBay, Equity Residential Said to Near Mega-REIT Tie-Up
summary: AvalonBay Communities Inc. and Equity Residential are nearing a deal that will see two of the biggest real estate investment trusts by value combine, people familiar with the matter said.

title: Hunter Biden Now Accepts Bitcoin for Artwork on His Official Website
summary:

title: Shai-Hulud: What to Know About the Malware Spreading Through Software Pipelines
summary: The Shai-Hulud supply-chain malware campaign is exploiting the automated systems developers trust to publish software safely.

title: SpaceX IPO Filing Shows Musk Building an AI and Space Infrastructure Giant
summary: The rocket maker’s IPO filing outlines billions in AI spending, Starship development, and Elon Musk’s effort to combine launch systems, satellite internet, social media, and artificial intelligence under one company.

title: Elon Musk’s SpaceX holds $1.45 billion worth of bitcoin as firm looks to go public
summary: A stockpile of over 18,000 would make Elon Musk's SpaceX the seventh-largest Bitcoin holder, ahead of Coinbase.

title: CryptoQuant says bitcoin mirrors 2022 bear market pattern as sentiment turns ‘extremely bearish’
summary: Bitcoin’s recent rally hit resistance at the 200-day MA near $82,400, a pattern CryptoQuant said is similar to the March 2022 bear market.

title: Musk’s SpaceX sets out plans for biggest IPO in history
summary: Satellite and AI company to list on Nasdaq under symbol SPCX

title: OpenAI readies IPO filing to list as soon as September
summary: AI lab is preparing for $1tn listing with bankers Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley and lawyers at Cooley
